Weedol LN Weed Control video Merchant video Previous page Kills weeds, not the lawn A selective weedkiller that targets common lawn weeds such as clover, dasies and dandelions. For a stronger lawn Get a stronger lawn and remove the need for it to compete for light and nutrients with weeds. Ready to use for spot weeding on lawns Available as a ready to use1 litre or 3 litre manual sprayer for easy spot weeding on lawns. Next page 1 Kills Weeds Not Lawns 2 Stronger Lawn 3 Ready To Use Remove the need for your lawn to compete with troublesome weeds Weedol LN Lawn Weed Control Ready to Use is a selective weedkiller that can target and kill weeds, not the lawn. Removing the need for your lawn to compete with weeds for light and nutrients, allowing for a healthier lawn. This weedkiller targets common lawn weeds such as dandelion, clover, daisies and plantain, as well as preventing the regrowth of them. Contains Mecoprop-P and dicamba. Why should I use Weedol Lawn Weed Control? Kills weeds, not the lawn. Get a stronger lawn and remove the need for it to compete for light and nutrients with weeds. This weedkiller targets common lawn weeds such as clover, dasies and dandelions. Prevents regrowth of weeds in the lawn. Where can I use Weedol Lawn Weed Control? For use on lawns. Kills perennial and broad-leaved weeds including dandelion, plantain, common chickweed, thistle, nettle and bramble. Doesn’t kill the lawn. Targets to the root to prevent re-growth. When should I use Weedol Lawn Weed Control? April – September when weeds are actively growing. For best results apply in calm, dry, warm conditions, usually early spring or summer, when there is no risk of spray drift onto adjacent desirable plants. How do I use Weedol Lawn Weed Control? Hold the sprayer approximately 50cm away from target weed and spray weeds evenly to lightly wet leaves, avoiding run-off. Is Weedol Lawn Weed Control safe to use on areas used by children and pets? Keep children and pets away from treated areas until spray has dried. Keep out of the reach of children. product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Do not apply to edible crops. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat sources and direct sunlight. Do not use on windy days to prevent drift onto nearby plants. In case of accidental contact, rinse thoroughly with water. If swallowed, seek medical advice immediately.
